Macro# kIOUSBMessageEndpointCountExceeded

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.7+

```
#define kIOUSBMessageEndpointCountExceeded
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/kiousbmessageendpointcountexceeded#discussion)

Messages specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_msg(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.
